testcase.name: Authentication › user can login with valid credentials

Authenticated User Tests › can see create deck button
Public Pages - No Auth Required › can view login page
Public Pages - No Auth Required › submit button is disabled when fields are empty
Public Pages - No Auth Required › can type in email and password fields
Study Session with Cleanup › @slow can complete study session with various grades
